steps.title: Show the infrared result
steps.content: The passage says most light from distant galaxies is infrared and the JWST is primarily an infrared telescope. The next idea follows as a result: JWST can provide more information about those galaxies than Hubble could.

steps.title: Use a result transition
steps.content: B signals contrast, but the ideas support each other. C signals an added point rather than a result. D suggests a correction or surprise, which is not the relationship here. The needed transition means "as a result." The answer is A.
